subcategory: Accordion FAQ with text reveal animation
use_cases: Expandable FAQ sections on product or help pages
Product feature explanations that expand on click
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based accordion component designed for FAQ sections with smooth expand/collapse animations. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and includes animated chevron rotation on state change. The component supports staggered text reveal effects and is optimized for both desktop and mobile platforms, making it suitable for help centers, documentation sites, and product pages.
